data.acceptance:
- `normalizeOpenCodeModel(rawModel)` exists in `src/lib/agent-identity.ts` next to the other per-provider normalisers.
- Parses `<router>/<vendor>/<model-with-version>` (e.g. `openrouter/moonshotai/kimi-k2.6` → `{ model: "openrouter/moonshotai/kimi-k2.6", flavor: "openrouter", version: "2.6" }`).
- Handles `openrouter/anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-5`, `openrouter/z-ai/glm-5.1`, `openrouter/mistral/devstral-2512`, and bare `kimi`.
- NEVER pulls a version from the OpenCode binary version, an env var, or any runtime hint.
- `normalizeAgentIdentity` calls `normalizeOpenCodeModel` for the OpenCode branch (replaces passthrough at agent-identity.ts:243-250).
- New test file `src/lib/__tests__/agent-identity-opencode.test.ts` covers all shapes above.
- The screenshot symptom "OpenCode … 4.7" is gone after this change lands.
